mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_block (blocker_id, blocked_id, created_at) VALUES (#{blockerId}, #{blockedId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT ub.*, u.nickname as blocked_nickname, p.profile_image_url as blocked_profile_image FROM user_block ub JOIN user u ON ub.blocked_id = u.id LEFT JOIN profile p ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE ub.blocker_id = #{blockerId} AND ub.blocked_id = #{blockedId}
SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM user_block WHERE (blocker_id = #{userId1} AND blocked_id = #{userId2}) OR (blocker_id = #{userId2} AND blocked_id = #{userId1}) )

SELECT ub.*, u.nickname as blocked_nickname, p.profile_image_url as blocked_profile_image FROM user_block ub JOIN user u ON ub.blocked_id = u.id LEFT JOIN profile p ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE ub.blocker_id = #{blockerId} ORDER BY ub.created_at DESC
SELECT blocker_id FROM user_block WHERE blocked_id = #{blockedId}
